headlines.title: Billions of meals at risk due to Iran war, says fertiliser boss
headlines.summary: A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.

headlines.title: Hegseth says clock paused on deadline to seek approval for Iran war
headlines.summary: The US defence secretary says the timer for the president to report to Congress 'pauses or stops' in a ceasefire.

headlines.title: Iran's supreme leader vows to protect nuclear and missile capabilities
headlines.summary: Iran's supreme leader affirms commitment to maintaining nuclear and missile programs amid ongoing tensions.

headlines.title: Trump administration says its war in Iran has been 'terminated' before 60-day deadline
headlines.summary: The administration claims the Iran war has been terminated prior to the War Powers Act deadline for congressional approval.

headlines.title: Key inflation gauge jumps to highest level in 3 years as Iran war spikes gas prices
headlines.summary: Consumer prices rise sharply, driven by increased energy costs resulting from the conflict in Iran.

headlines.title: Israel releases all but two activists in Greece after intercepting Gaza aid flotilla
headlines.summary: The Global Sumud Flotilla denounced the interception as 'piracy', while Israel's foreign ministry called the flotilla a 'PR stunt'.

headlines.title: Deadly Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon despite ceasefire
headlines.summary: Seventeen people - including two children - were killed, according to Lebanon's health ministry.

headlines.title: Myanmar ex-leader Aung San Suu Kyi moved to house arrest, military says
headlines.summary: The Nobel Peace Prize laureate has been in detention since she was ousted in a military coup in 2021.

headlines.title: China scraps tariffs for all but one African nation
headlines.summary: The zero-tariff regime gives China's soft power a boost, but may lead to uneven gains, say analysts.

headlines.title: US imposes sanctions on DR Congo ex-President Kabila alleging rebel support
headlines.summary: The former leader has not responded to US accusations that he is aiming to destabilise the government.

headlines.title: Trump gives go-ahead to major new Canada-US oil pipeline
headlines.summary: Approval granted for significant new pipeline project between Canada and the United States.

headlines.title: Mexico to investigate US indictment of officials for alleged Sinaloa Cartel ties
headlines.summary: Mexican authorities launch investigation following US indictment of officials linked to drug cartel.
